summary: Frontend-only Playwright verification of the hero carousel Semantic Layer inner sub-carousel (Analytics / P2P / O2C), plus ribbon copy, source-column badges, hero capability grid, stat bullet copy, and Team section placement/assets. 50/50 assertions PASS on the second run.
verified_behaviours: hero-carousel-view-warehouse is the active first slide (opacity-100).
wh-process-tabs container renders 3 pills with data-testids wh-process-tab-analytics|p2p|o2c.
Analytics tab is active by default with bg-[#0A0A0A] and shows panel wh-process-panel-analytics containing 'Board dashboard', 'Consolidation', 'Scorecards', 'Planning models'.

Auto-rotation cycles Analytics -> P2P (~3.2s) -> O2C (~6.4s) while warehouse view is active. P2P panel shows 'PO issued', '3-way match', 'Approvals', 'Payment run'. O2C panel shows 'Quote -> Order', 'Invoice sent', 'Collections', 'DSO tracker'.
Clicking wh-process-tab-p2p / o2c / analytics immediately switches the visible panel to the corresponding wh-process-panel-* (confirmed on retry with 150ms wait after click).
Tabs are not clipped: right edge of wh-process-tab-o2c (x=1530) is inside the mockup card (right edge=1560).
Eyebrow reads 'ACME CORP' and heading reads 'Business Data Hub' inside the semantic-layer view.
Ribbon shows three chips: 'Custom workflows', 'Live in 15 days or less', 'No upfront cost · pay on value' (emerald). 'Fraction of the cost' is NOT present anywhere on the page.
Left source column has QuickBooks with POPULAR badge, industry connectors Toast/Procore/BuilderTrend/Epic with INDUSTRY badges, and dashed 'and 100+ more' row.
Hero capability grid contains all 5 items: 'Consolidate entities', 'Automate month-end close', 'Planning & forecasting', 'Centralise business data & ops', 'People & manager scorecards'.
Stat bullet hero-stat-close reads 'Accurate books, quick close'. 'Touchless close' and 'Close 6x faster' are absent from the page.
Section order on the landing page confirmed by scroll positions: trust-bar (772) -> team (864) -> use-cases (1405).
Team cards team-card-0 (Vaishnav) and team-card-1 (Ujjwal) are rendered; /team/vaishnav.webp and /team/ujjwal.webp both return HTTP 200.
flaky_tests: First run: click on wh-process-tab-p2p immediately after ~7s of auto-rotation waits was checked at only 300ms; the inner setInterval fired during that window and the panel had already advanced. Retest with a shorter (150ms) check and no prior long waits confirmed clicking any tab flips the panel immediately. Behaviour is correct; the initial assertion was a timing race in the test script, not a product bug.
critical_code_review_comments: WHProcesses setInterval is not reset when a user clicks a tab — so shortly after a manual click, the panel may auto-advance. Not required by the spec but consider clearing/resetting the interval on manual click for better UX.

HeroCarousel.jsx is ~1075 lines and contains many sub-views (BoardView, ReconView, PeopleView, WarehouseView, P2P, O2C). Consider splitting each view into its own module (guideline: >700 lines should be split).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All assertions from the review_request pass. Only nit: manual tab click does not reset the 3.2s auto-rotate interval, so if a user clicks near the end of a tick they may see the panel advance shortly after. If the product spec requires 'sticky' behaviour on click, add clearInterval + setInterval reset inside the onClick handler in WHProcesses (HeroCarousel.jsx ~line 782).
